case_title: JEREMY DANIEL KANDAH et al VS. JASON E. BOARDE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AMANDA FISCHER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANDAH, JEREMY DANIEL KANDAH, JORDAN LEIGH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOARDE, JASON E. $3,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT.
